name: continuum
description: Epic Continuum local persistent memory, context continuity, and crash recovery for Codex-compatible agents.

interface.longDescription: Epic Continuum exposes a local Scroll, Library, Card catalog, context compiler, operation ledger, and recovery packet generator to Codex-compatible agents.
defaultPrompt: Recover this thread with Epic Continuum.
Append this session to Epic Continuum.
